mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_event (biz_id, topic, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{bizId}, #{topic}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetry}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'SENDING' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'INIT'
UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'SENT' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING'
UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'INIT', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING'
